/usr/bin/clang++  -std=c++17 -pthread -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/pacman.dir/src/audio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pacman.dir/src/events.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pacman.dir/src/game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pacman.dir/src/globaltypes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pacman.dir/src/goodie.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pacman.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pacman.dir/src/map.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pacman.dir/src/mapelement.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pacman.dir/src/monster.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pacman.dir/src/pacman.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pacman.dir/src/renderer.cpp.o -o pacman   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib/libSDL2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libSDL2_image.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libSDL2_ttf.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libSDL2_ttf.dylib -framework Cocoa /opt/homebrew/lib/libSDL2_mixer.dylib
